, steps_per_epoch: int):\\n    if not USE_LR_SCHEDULE:\\n        return None\\n    total_steps = TRAIN_MAX_STEPS if TRAIN_MAX_STEPS is not None else steps_per_epoch * 100\\n    warmup_steps = max(1, total_steps // 10)\\n\\n    def lr_lambda(step: int) -> float:\\n        if step < warmup_steps:\\n            return float(step + 1) / float(warmup_steps)\\n        progress = (step - warmup_steps) / float(max(1, total_steps - warmup_steps))\\n        progress = min(1.0, max(0.0, progress))\\n        return 0.5 * (1.0 + math.cos(math.pi * progress))\\n\\n    return optim.lr_scheduler.LambdaLR(optimizer, lr_lambda)\",\"text\":\"\"}],\"primary_mode\":\"layout\",\"rationale\":\"Increase model capacity modestly and pair it with AdamW plus a fixed-step warmup/cosine schedule tuned for the 256-step budget.\",\"secondary_modes\":[\"summaries\",\"indexing\"]}"}}
